{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/205863854?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kikayli/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kikayli/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kikayli/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kikayli/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/kikayli", "id": 205863854, "login": "kikayli", "node_id": "U_kgDODEU7rg", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kikayli/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kikayli/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kikayli/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kikayli/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kikayli/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/kikayli", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-43529", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 2.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:L/AC:H/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:L/VI:N/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-367", "name": "Time-of-check Time-of-use (TOCTOU) Race Condition"}], "description": "## Summary

OpenClaw's exec script preflight validator previously validated and then read a script by mutable pathname. A local race could swap the path between validation and read, causing preflight analysis to inspect a different file identity than the one that passed the workspace boundary check.

## Affected Packages / Versions

- Package: `openclaw`
- Ecosystem: npm
- Affected versions: `< 2026.4.10`
- Patched versions: `>= 2026.4.10`

## Impact

The impact is limited. This was not arbitrary full-file disclosure through the preflight error path. The validator only surfaced derived preflight content, such as a matched token, a line number, or the first non-empty JavaScript line in one branch. Exploitation also required the ability to mutate the relevant workspace path during the preflight window.

Still, this was a real TOCTOU boundary bug in code that is supposed to reason about workspace-local script files before execution. A file identity that passed the initial boundary validation could differ from the identity that was later read for preflight analysis.

## Technical Details

The vulnerable flow performed separate path validation and file reads in `validateScriptFileForShellBleed`. Because the read was path-based, an attacker with write access to the workspace path could race replacement of the target after validation but before preflight read.

## Fix

PR #62333 replaced the check-then-read flow with a pinned safe-open/read path using the shared `readFileWithinRoot` helper. The fixed path performs boundary verification around the opened file identity and avoids relying on a mutable pathname for the final preflight read. Regression tests cover both pre-open and post-open swap windows.

## Fix Commit(s)

- `b024fae9e5df43e9b69b2daebb72be3469d52e91` (`fix(exec): replace TOCTOU check-then-read with atomic pinned-fd open in script preflight [AI]`)
- PR: #62333

## Release Process Note

The fix first shipped in `v2026.4.10`. Users should upgrade to `openclaw` `2026.4.10` or newer; the latest npm release already includes the fix.

## Credits

Thanks to @kikayli for reporting this issue.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00079, "percentile": 0.00206}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-gj9q-8w99-mp8j", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-16T21:19:21Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-gj9q-8w99-mp8j", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-gj9q-8w99-mp8j"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-43529"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-04-16T21:19:21Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-gj9q-8w99-mp8j", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/62333", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/b024fae9e5df43e9b69b2daebb72be3469d52e91", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-gj9q-8w99-mp8j"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-gj9q-8w99-mp8j", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: TOCTOU read in exec script preflight", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-05T11:57:02Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-gj9q-8w99-mp8j", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.4.10", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.4.10"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: OpenClaw: TOCTOU read in exec script preflight
